npc1.line1:
The void creatures that emerges in the night..., some said,
that they would come due to the experiments of
the outlanders, who corrupted the lands to gain power
npc1.line2:
Even I, on my own, saw their ritual circles! If you ask me,
they doomed us all!
npc1.line3:
They brought the curse upon us, Bears and Wolfs
aren't the only aggressive Creatures here anymore.
They hunt yes, but the void brute, is pure hostile
npc1.line4:
Listen, this is important, I invented a laboratory that combines
the darkness and the light, there is no shadow without light,
and light means hope, so I call it the 'Shadow Lab'.
It can be used to infuse various things with
twilight essence, an ingriedient you will get from this lab.
 You just need to find Duskmoon, its easy as it is to find such
poisonous corrupted places. And you need Dawnberries,
you might have seen them already probably. Or not.
npc1.line5: Unfortunately my Shadow Lab was destroyed by a Golem, whilst experimenting. So you need to Craft it on your Own, here is the recipe! The thing is, it involves knowledge of the Void, such is only available through a Void Grimoire if you don't Have a copy of it already, you need to find one quickly.
npc1.line6: would do it on my own, but I am to old now, to face these Creatures another time, I might wont get back alive. Sorry to bother you with that burden, but if you succeed you might be the Cursebreaker! Its just hypothetical and it definitely needs further research. But it should be possible to heal the corrupted places, and maybe, who knows, you could end the curse and banish the Void Creatures as well!
npc1.line7: If you would do me the favor, return to me after you managed to get twilight essence, and if you do so, bring something with you, and the beans, I want to taste them at least once more. | End of the Chapter!

npc1.line1: Great, you returned, that could wether mean you forgot what I said, or you may were successfull.
npc1.line2: Ok, so you managed to get the Essence, and I am glad you came back, I mentioned that you can infuse stuff with it, but I totally missed to tell you how and what you can do with it.
npc1.line3: So, you may noticed already that the Shadow lab has a Tank, where the Essence is stored, and Im glad you managed to crystalized it, so you understand at least half of the functionalities of my Invention
npc1.line4: As far as I have Investigated, most of normal Gear can be infused with the Twilight essence, but the results are more or less stable, It seems that durability Gain is the most common effect, sometimes your protection is higher, your weapons make more damage but I completely am out of answeres how this system works. I barely can Imagine, that it is the unstable state of twilight itself. So further research is needed!
npc1.line5: Im sorry when it sounds I would know everything but I am just a hermit that touched his hands on something that was to big for him. But I really want to see Orbis recover from this curse, so if you progress you are more than welcome to talk to me about your results | End of the Chapter!

npc1.line1: Brave one, you returned a second time, you seem to get used to twilight stuff, that's nice, and the fact that you returned means to me a lot!
npc1.line2: Theres so much more that I could tell, but I think the time's not right yet. But I appreciate that you continue to listen to an old man who's mind looks like a mashed potato more and more every new day. Haha, just kidding.
npc1.line3: I have a gift for you; this prism, contains strong energy of both, the light and the dark. If you are braver than me, I want you to put it in the empty slot in the laboratory. Its outcome is not clear yet but as I first forged this prism, it felt like, the infusements of my gear reacted to it. I feared to put it in.
npc1.line4: Now that you came so far, I have another task..., ...no, not task that's not right, Its the burden that all of our Kind has to carry along, its the Mark on our shoulder, the Evil Contained, talk to the Dragon in the Frozen Lands, he will guide you further | End of the Chapter!

npc1.line1: The fact that you came back, after you must heave heard that I did not tell you the entire truth, just means, that  you want revenge, or just answers
npc1.line2: I am sorry, yes Im older than most of all living creatures on Orbis. But that doesnt mean I lied to you, sometimes its better to let the elders speak, you probably wouldnt believe it when I told you. Dragons? No one had seed them for decades.
npc1.line3: I wasnt there when the Dragons brother had turned voidsided, but I saw it at some others, the Outsiders for example. The first was captured by varyn, I was too, but I did managed to escape, whilst he turned my inmate into a bulky gruesome Outsider.
npc1.line4: Sorry, it hurts to think about it, I flew but I saw everything, it was gross. Voidsided ones, seem to transfer some of their corruption to others. and where they sleep and wander, they spread it to the sorroundings. I dont know what Varyn wants. But maybe we find it out some day
npc1.line5:
So if you didnt already,
progress with the dragons plan, Orbis needs you!

npc2.line1: Greetings, Sprout of Orbis! I sensed thee throughout the shattered pieces Orbis had fallen into. I acknowledge thy anticipation to bring the work of the first one to an end. Did he not tell thee that he hath seen so many of thy kind fail long before thee? But none of that mattereth now thou shalt take his place and fulfill his contract.
npc2.line2: One of the main Voidsided Creatures need to be taken down or cleansed, it is so I have to Admit, my own brother who turned from Light to Dark. He is one of Gaias first childs shed ever brought to Orbis, and my older brother. His scales bear the power to heal nature and he used this gift all his life to cure and purify every living being in pain, his eyes could saw
npc2.line3: But one day, I dont know when, Varyn must have took his will to protect this world, it was the last time I saw him, his firery red Scales, had turned into Purple and his Eyes where pure Voidness. He flew away and a Portal Gate opened right infront of him. I can sense him, he must reside still anywhere in this World, but Since Orbis was Scatterd, it might be a different Piece of Orbis.
npc2.line4: This tears of mine would open up Gates to find my brother, if the flask is empty, and you havent reached him yet, return to me and I fill it up, maybe the Laboratory of the first one could synthesize this effect but it might be not strong enough.
npc2.line5: This second potion, dont mix them up! Infuse your Arrows with it, In hope that the connection between my brother and me isnt completely Cut, should cleanse him. Do me the favor, just end his life if it is neccessary, he is not Evil!

npc1.line1: Good! when ice and fire, are free, the Prophecy should reveal its key! I thank you and I can not tell you how much, you fullfilled what I wasnt  able to manage. Finally I am free, even I am too old, to do anything now, but where there is life, there is hope isnt it?
npc1.line2: This, isnt much, I know, you may await gold or other valuable goods, but all I can give you is this statue I carved on my Own to thank you.
npc1.line3: Please find a good place for it, and protect it, I might not be able to Carve it again.
npc1.line4: Whatever happens next, even if I am not there at a future time. Please be the hero of Orbis!

npc2.line1: I am sad that you had to do it this way, I never thought it was possible, but as he died, it teared a part of my soul out of me!
npc2.line2: I could tell you so many things about Gaia and Varyn, but it feels like not the right time and place for it.
npc2.line3: Visit the first one again, he may want to give you something too!
npc2.line4: I await for the future to call for you again, you will know when the time has come, know proceed, brave one!

npc1.line1: Good! when ice and fire, are free, the Prophecy should reveal its key! I thank you and I can not tell you how much, you fullfilled what I wasnt  able to manage. Finally I am free, even I am too old, to do anything now, but where there is life, there is hope isnt it?
npc1.line2: This, isnt much, I know, you may await gold or other valuable goods, but all I can give you is this statue I carved on my Own to thank you.
npc1.line3: Please find a good place for it, and protect it, I might not be able to Carve it again.
npc1.line4: Whatever happens next, even if I am not there at a future time. Please be the hero of Orbis!

npc2.line1: Greetings, I heard of your glorious success, my brother visited not long before your arrival, but vanished again, maybe he tries to heal the Lands. He Gave me this, Some of his scales, you could try to invent a method with the lab of the first one. To heal the Land on your own
npc2.line2: My brother is back, but so many arent, it is your burden to search for an solution to heal Orbis, its your destiny, dont forget it!
npc2.line3: I could tell you so many things about Gaia and Varyn, but it feels like not the right time and place for it.
npc2.line4: Visit the first one again, he may want to give you something too!
npc2.line5: I await for the future to call for you again, you will know when the time has come, know proceed, brave one!
